scripts.db:empty:d1:local: node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs d1 execute MEMOS_DB --local --yes --file scripts/d1-empty-local-data.sql
scripts.db:migrate:d1:local: node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs d1 migrations apply MEMOS_DB --local
scripts.db:migrate:d1:remote: node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs d1 migrations apply MEMOS_DB --remote
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -c auto -n api,web,urls "npm run dev:node" "npm run dev:web" "node scripts/print-dev-urls-when-ready.mjs"
scripts.dev:worker: node scripts/ensure-web-build-for-worker.mjs && node scripts/ensure-wrangler-local-dev-vars.mjs && npm run db:migrate:d1:local && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs dev
scripts.build:web: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:node
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run build:web && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs versions upload
scripts.deploy:worker:full: npm run build:web && node scripts/run-wrangler.mjs deploy
